overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Star Wars action-adventure game showing a character navigating a dimly lit industrial facility. The character climbs a metal grate wall, explores an upper walkway, and engages in combat with an enemy in a hazy, atmospheric environment with warm artificial lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow industrial corridor with large cylindrical tanks and metal shelving

entered.detail: large rusted cylindrical industrial tank with metallic surface
tall metal shelving with various industrial items and crates
network of large metal pipes running vertically and horizontally along the wall
stack of wooden crates and containers
vertical metal grate wall with ladder-like structure for climbing

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit industrial corridor with warm artificial lighting. Large cylindrical tanks line the left side while metal shelving units stand on the right. The character approaches a metal grate wall at the end of the corridor, preparing to ascend.

events.description: character begins climbing the metal grate wall using hands and feet

agents.ego_description: climbing vertically up the metal grate wall toward the overhead platform

entered.detail: concrete platform with metal railings visible at the top of the climb

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the metal grate wall in a vertical shaft. The camera follows the climbing motion as the character pulls themselves upward, with industrial pipes visible along the right wall and the overhead platform approaching.

events.description: character moves from enclosed corridor to open walkway with view of lower level

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper platform, examining the control panel and looking over the railing into the lower industrial pit

entered.detail: industrial control panel with three large red circular buttons and gauges
large green metal roll-up industrial door
simple metal bench with slatted seating
metal safety railing along the edge of the platform
open industrial pit visible below with machinery and scattered debris

segments.scene_description: The character explores the elevated industrial walkway, passing a control panel with red buttons and a metal bench. The character approaches the safety railing and looks down into the lower industrial area, revealing a large open pit with machinery below.

events.description: character jumps down from the upper walkway to the lower industrial floor
character engages in melee combat with humanoid enemy

agents.ego_description: dropping down from the platform and immediately engaging an enemy combatant with melee attacks

notable_agents.action: humanoid enemy standing on raised platform, wielding a weapon and preparing to attack

entered.detail: massive industrial machinery with cylindrical components and pipes
stack of large metal shipping containers and crates
elevated metal catwalk structure with railings

segments.scene_description: The character leaps down from the upper walkway into the lower industrial pit, landing near stacked metal containers. The character immediately engages in combat with a humanoid enemy standing on a raised platform near large industrial machinery.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial facility that transitions from a narrow corridor to an elevated walkway and finally into a combat-filled pit. It begins with the character walking through a corridor lined with cylindrical tanks and metal shelving under warm artificial lighting before approaching a metal grate wall. As the character begins to ascend, the camera follows the vertical climb up the grate, passing industrial pipes until the character reaches an overhead platform. The scene then shifts to an elevated walkway where the character passes a control panel and a metal bench before peering over a safety railing into a large open pit. Finally, the camera plunges downward as the character leaps from the walkway, landing near stacked metal containers to engage a humanoid enemy atop a raised platform.
